audit_items.proof_trace: subopts_orig allocated via strdup() at L5179 but dozens of return statements between L5195-5603 exit before free() at L5611. Any sub-option validation failure leaks the allocated memory.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker provides invalid sub-option values (e.g. hashpower=1, slab_automove=999) causing main() to return early and leak strdup() allocated memory.
